code:
%%{Logistics_DeliveryRoute}}}%%
stateDiagram-v2
    [Logistics_Warehouse] --> Idle: App Start
    
    Idle --> Recording: Start Recording
    Recording --> Paused: Pause
    Paused --> Recording: Resume
    Recording --> Saving: Stop Recording
    Paused --> Saving: Stop Recording
    Saving --> Idle: Save Complete
    
    Idle --> Loading: Load Session
    Loading --> Ready: Session Loaded
    Ready --> Playing: Play
    Playing --> Paused2: Pause
    Paused2 --> Playing: Resume
    Playing --> Ready: Stop/Complete
    Ready --> Idle: Close Session
    
    state Recording {Logistics_TrackingNumber] --> Capturing
        Capturing --> Capturing: Packet Received
        Capturing --> BufferFull: Buffer Limit
        BufferFull --> Flushing: Auto-flush
        Flushing --> Capturing: Flush Complete
    }
    
    state Playing {Logistics_TrackingNumber] --> Emitting
        Emitting --> Waiting: Packet Emitted
        Waiting --> Emitting: Delay Complete
        Emitting --> [Logistics_FleetManagement]: Last Packet
    }
    
    note right of Recording
        Captures:
        - Timestamp
        - Direction
        - Raw hex
        - Decoded JSON
        - Action name
    end note
    
    note right of Playing
        Replay Options:
        - Speed: 0.5x - 4x
        - Seek to position
        - Step forward/back
        - Filter by action
    end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个物流追踪系统的状态机，核心是处理从仓库发货到车队调度的全程记录与回放。起点应该是Logistics_Warehouse，系统启动后进入Idle状态。
明白，Idle作为初始状态。那Recording和Playing是两个主要工作模式吗？我看到您提到了记录和回放。
对，Recording是实时捕获物流数据，Playing是历史回放。Recording内部需要处理Logistics_TrackingNumber的捕获流程，包括Capturing状态，还要考虑BufferFull时的自动刷新机制。
好的，我先把主流程画出来：Idle可以通过Start Recording进入Recording，Recording可以Pause到Paused，也能Resume回来。另外从Recording和Paused都能Stop Recording到Saving，最后Save Complete回到Idle。
Playback部分需要独立设计：从Idle可以Load Session进入Loading，加载完成后到Ready状态，然后Play进入Playing。Playing的暂停我注意到和Recording的暂停状态重名了，得区分开。
确实，我把Playing下的暂停状态改成Paused2，避免和Recording流程的Paused混淆。Playing内部的发射流程是：Logistics_TrackingNumber进入Emitting，发完包后Waiting，延迟完成继续Emitting，最后一个包直接到Logistics_FleetManagement。
没错，Playing最后要把数据推送到车队管理系统。Recording那边我也补充一下细节：Capturing状态收到Packet Received会自循环，Buffer Limit时转到BufferFull，然后Auto-flush进入Flushing，Flush Complete再回到Capturing。
已添加。另外我在Recording右侧加了一个注释，说明捕获内容包括Timestamp、Direction、Raw hex、Decoded JSON和Action name。Playing那边也加上Replay Options的说明，包括Speed调节、Seek、Step和Filter功能。
完美。最后确认一下闭环：Playing可以Stop/Complete回到Ready，Ready可以Close Session回到Idle，这样整个会话生命周期就完整了。
